reference: Hello. A couple of days after my second waxing, I experienced an itching sensation on my body, mainly in the chest area. It turned red and now I have small pimples or acne that are a bit reddish in color. They are somewhat itchy when I touch them. How can I get rid of them? Will I have any marks left after the cure if there are any? I did not encounter this after my first waxing. I wax because I do bodybuilding.
text: Hello? A couple of days after my second waxing, I experienced an itching sensation on my body, namely in the chest area. It turned red, and now I have small pimples or acne that are a bit reddish in color. They are somewhat itchy when I touch them. How can I get rid of them? Will I have any marks left after the cure, if there are any? I did not encounter this after my first waxing. I wax because I do bodybuilding.
